reasoning_model_1: The model fails significantly on Content Accuracy. Instead of reading the sentence once, it repeats the phrase '快看，那是什么一闪而过' approximately five times throughout the 10-second clip (00:00-00:10). Regarding the target feature 'extremely fast speaking rate' (语速), the model fails to execute this command. Each repetition is spoken at a normal, moderate conversational pace, lacking the urgency and rapidity requested. Because the content is hallucinated (excessive repetition) and the core paralinguistic feature is completely missing (normal speed instead of fast), this is a failed generation.
reasoning_model_2: The model demonstrates perfect Content Accuracy, speaking the text '快看，那是什么？一闪而过' exactly once without errors. Regarding the target feature 'extremely fast speaking rate' (语速), the model performs excellently. The entire sentence is delivered in under 2 seconds (00:00-00:02), with shortened syllable duration and a high-tempo rhythm that accurately reflects the instruction 'extremely fast'. The prosody remains natural despite the high speed, conveying the appropriate sense of urgency associated with seeing something flash by.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 completely failed the task by repeating the text multiple times instead of saying it once, and crucially, it spoke at a normal/slow pace rather than the requested 'extremely fast' speed. Model 2 followed the content instructions perfectly and successfully applied the 'extremely fast' speaking rate, delivering the line with appropriate speed and urgency.
